title: Escalation Handling Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger escalation handling foundations judgment so customer success work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Escalation Handling Foundations is a leverage point inside customer success. It supports the broader goal of retention, onboarding, support, and churn prevention.
coreConcepts: Escalation Handling Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good escalation handling foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Escalation Handling Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
